task:
Add vim word/character motions to the vimflowy app in app.cljs. These work in INSERT mode to move the cursor within the contentEditable text.

ADD THESE KEYBINDINGS (INSERT mode only, when contentEditable span is focused):
  w  → move cursor to start of next word
  b  → move cursor to start of previous word  
  e  → move cursor to end of current/next word
  ge → move cursor to end of previous word
  f  → wait for next character, then move cursor to that character (find)
  t  → wait for next character, then move cursor to just before it (till)

IMPLEMENTATION:
1. Add a helper (get-text-el) that returns the focused node's contentEditable span
2. Add (get-cursor-pos el) using window.getSelection().getRangeAt(0) and a pre-range trick to find character offset
3. Add (set-cursor-pos el pos) using range.setStart on the text node
4. Add cursor-word-forward!/backward!/end!/end-backward! that parse text for word boundaries (space/newline delimited)
5. Add cursor-find-char!/till-char! that use .indexOf on the text
6. Use an atom to track pending f/t motion (f waits for next key)
7. Bind these in handle-key under INSERT mode (not normal mode)

Words are delimited by spaces, tabs, and newlines. Use replace_in_file for surgical edits. Export and task_complete when done.

;; ──────────────────────────────────────────────
;; Vimflowy — Tree Outliner with Vim Keybindings
;; ──────────────────────────────────────────────

;; ── Utils ──
(defn gen-id [] (str "n" (random-uuid)))

;; ── Global State ──
(defonce app (atom nil))

(defn nodes [] (:nodes @app))
(defn focused [] (:focused @app))
(defn mode [] (:mode @app))
(defn help? [] (:help @app))

;; ── Persistence ──
(def storage-key "vimflowy-data-v2")

(defn save-local []
  (try
    (.setItem js/localStorage storage-key (js/JSON.stringify (clj->js @app)))
    (catch js/Error _ nil)))

(defn load-local []
  (try
    (let [raw (.getItem js/localStorage storage-key)]
      (when raw
        (let [parsed (js->clj (js/JSON.parse raw) :keywordize-keys true)]
          (reset! app parsed))
        true))
    (catch js/Error _ false)))

;; ── Tree Operations ──
(defn node-at [id] (get (nodes) id))
(defn parent-of [id] (:parent (node-at id)))
(defn children-of [id] (:children (node-at id)))
(defn depth [id]
  (loop [n id d 0]
    (let [p (parent-of n)]
      (if (or (nil? p) (= p "root")) d (recur p (inc d))))))

(defn flat-visible []
  (let [nds (nodes)]
    (loop [stack (list (get nds "root"))
           result []]
      (if (empty? stack)
        result
        (let [node (first stack)
              remaining (rest stack)]
          (if (:collapsed node)
            (recur remaining (conj result (:id node)))
            (recur (into (mapv (fn [id] (get nds id)) (reverse (:children node))) remaining)
                   (conj result (:id node)))))))))

(defn index-of [id]
  (let [vs (flat-visible)]
    (first (keep-indexed (fn [i v] (when (= v id) i)) vs))))

(defn node-at-index [idx]
  (let [vs (flat-visible)]
    (when (and (>= idx 0) (< idx (count vs)))
      (nth vs idx))))

(defn sibling-index [id]
  (let [p (parent-of id)]
    (when p
      (let [sibs (children-of p)]
        (first (keep-indexed (fn [i s] (when (= s id) i)) sibs))))))

(defn prev-sibling [id]
  (let [p (parent-of id) sibs (children-of p) si (sibling-index id)]
    (when (and si (> si 0)) (nth sibs (dec si)))))

(defn next-sibling [id]
  (let [p (parent-of id) sibs (children-of p) si (sibling-index id)]
    (when (and si (< si (dec (count sibs)))) (nth sibs (inc si)))))

;; ── Mutations ──
(defn update-node! [id f & args]
  (swap! app (fn [st]
               (let [nd (get-in st [:nodes id])]
                 (if nd
                   (assoc-in st [:nodes id] (apply f nd args))
                   st)))))

(defn set-text! [id text]
  (update-node! id assoc :text text))

(defn set-collapsed! [id v]
  (update-node! id assoc :collapsed v))

(defn toggle-collapsed! [id]
  (update-node! id update :collapsed not))

(defn toggle-completed! [id]
  (update-node! id update :completed not))

(defn focus! [id]
  (swap! app assoc :focused id))

(defn set-mode! [m]
  (swap! app assoc :mode m))

(defn toggle-help! []
  (swap! app update :help not))

(defn add-child! [parent-id]
  (let [nid (gen-id)]
    (swap! app (fn [st]
                 (-> st
                     (assoc-in [:nodes nid] {:id nid :text "" :parent parent-id :children [] :collapsed false :completed false})
                     (update-in [:nodes parent-id :children] #(vec (cons nid %))))))
    (focus! nid)
    nid))

(defn add-sibling-after! [id]
  (let [p (parent-of id)]
    (when p
      (let [nid (gen-id)
            sibs (children-of p)
            si (sibling-index id)]
        (swap! app (fn [st]
                     (-> st

                         (update-in [:nodes p :children]
                                    (fn [chs]
                                      (let [before (subvec chs 0 (inc si))
                                            after (subvec chs (inc si))]
                                        (into (conj before nid) after)))))))
        (focus! nid)
        nid))))

;; Helper: get the focused contentEditable span
(defn get-text-el []
  (let [el (.-activeElement js/document)]
    (when (and el (.-classList el) (.contains (.-classList el) "text-node"))
      el)))

;; Quick test
(println "get-text-el defined:" (fn? get-text-el))

;; Get cursor position (character offset) within a contentEditable element
(defn get-cursor-pos [el]
  (let [sel (js/window.getSelection)]
    (when (and sel (> (.-rangeCount sel) 0))
      (let [rng (.getRangeAt sel 0)
            pre-rng (js/document.createRange)]
        (.selectNodeContents pre-rng el)
        (.setEnd pre-rng (.-startContainer rng) (.-startOffset rng))
        (count (.toString pre-rng))))))

(println "get-cursor-pos defined:" (fn? get-cursor-pos))

;; Set cursor position within a contentEditable element
(defn set-cursor-pos [el pos]
  (let [text-node (.-firstChild el)]
    (when text-node
      (let [rng (js/document.createRange)
            sel (js/window.getSelection)
            safe-pos (min pos (count (.-textContent el)))]
        (.setStart rng text-node safe-pos)
        (.collapse rng true)
        (.removeAllRanges sel)
        (.addRange sel rng)
        (.focus el)))))

(println "set-cursor-pos defined:" (fn? set-cursor-pos))

;; Whitespace chars for word boundaries
(def whitespace-set #{\space \tab \newline})

(defn space? [ch] (contains? whitespace-set ch))
(defn word? [ch] (not (space? ch)))

;; w - move to start of next word
(defn cursor-word-forward! [el]
  (when-let [pos (get-cursor-pos el)]
    (let [text (.-textContent el)
          len (count text)]
      (loop [i pos]
        (if (and (< i len) (word? (nth text i)))
          (recur (inc i))          ;; skip current word
          (loop [j i]
            (if (and (< j len) (space? (nth text j)))
              (recur (inc j))      ;; skip whitespace
              (when (< j len)
                (set-cursor-pos el j)))))))))

(println "cursor-word-forward! defined:" (fn? cursor-word-forward!))

;; b - move to start of previous word
(defn cursor-word-backward! [el]
  (when-let [pos (get-cursor-pos el)]
    (let [text (.-textContent el)]
      ;; Go left one, then skip whitespace backwards
      (loop [i (max (dec pos) 0)]
        (if (and (>= i 0) (space? (nth text i)))
          (recur (dec i))
          ;; Now skip word characters backwards
          (loop [j i]
            (if (and (>= j 0) (word? (nth text j)))
              (recur (dec j))
              ;; j is at the char before the word start, so word starts at j+1
              (set-cursor-pos el (inc j)))))))))

(println "cursor-word-backward! defined:" (fn? cursor-word-backward!))

;; e - move to end of current/next word
(defn cursor-word-end! [el]
  (when-let [pos (get-cursor-pos el)]
    (let [text (.-textContent el)
          len (count text)]
      (when (< pos len)
        ;; Check: are we on a word char and NOT at the end of that word?
        (if (and (word? (nth text pos))
                 (< (inc pos) len)
                 (word? (nth text (inc pos))))
          ;; In middle of a word → skip to end of this word
          (loop [i (inc pos)]
            (if (and (< i len) (word? (nth text i)))
              (recur (inc i))
              (set-cursor-pos el (dec i))))
          ;; At word-end or on whitespace → skip to end of next word
          (loop [j pos]
            ;; First skip any whitespace
            (if (and (< j len) (space? (nth text j)))
              (recur (inc j))
              ;; Now skip to end of this word
              (loop [k j]
                (if (and (< k len) (word? (nth text k)))
                  (recur (inc k))
                  (when (> k j)
                    (set-cursor-pos el (dec k))))))))))))

(println "cursor-word-end! defined:" (fn? cursor-word-end!))

(defonce key-seq (atom []))

;; ── Cursor / Text Helpers ──

(defn get-text-el []
  (let [active-el (.-activeElement js/document)]
    (when (and active-el (.. active-el -classList (contains "text-node")))
      active-el)))

(defn get-cursor-pos [el]
  (try
    (let [sel (js/window.getSelection)]
      (when (and sel (pos? (.-rangeCount sel)))
        (let [range (.getRangeAt sel 0)
              text-node (.-firstChild el)]
          (when (and text-node (= (.-nodeType text-node) 3))
            (let [pre-range (.cloneRange range)]
              (.setStart pre-range text-node 0)
              (.-length (.toString pre-range)))))))
    (catch js/Error _ nil)))

(defn set-cursor-pos [el pos]
  (let [text-node (.-firstChild el)]
    (when (and text-node (= (.-nodeType text-node) 3))
      (let [len (.-length text-node)
            safe-pos (max 0 (min pos len))
            range (.createRange js/document)
            sel (js/window.getSelection)]
        (.setStart range text-node safe-pos)
        (.collapse range true)
        (.removeAllRanges sel)
        (.addRange sel range)
        (.focus el)))))

(defn word-delim? [ch]
  (or (= ch " ") (= ch "\t") (= ch "\n")))

(defn cursor-word-forward! [el]
  (when-let [pos (get-cursor-pos el)]
    (let [text (.-textContent el)
          len (count text)]
      (loop [i pos]
        (let [i (loop [j i]
                  (if (and (< j len) (not (word-delim? (str (aget text j)))))
                    (recur (inc j))
                    j))
              i (loop [j i]
                  (if (and (< j len) (word-delim? (str (aget text j))))
                    (recur (inc j))
                    j))]
          (set-cursor-pos el i))))))

(defn cursor-word-backward! [el]
  (when-let [pos (get-cursor-pos el)]
    (let [text (.-textContent el)]
      (loop [i (dec pos)]
        (if (< i 0)
          (set-cursor-pos el 0)
          (if (word-delim? (str (aget text i)))
            (recur (dec i))
            (loop [j i]
              (if (or (< j 0) (word-delim? (str (aget text j))))
                (set-cursor-pos el (inc j))
                (recur (dec j))))))))))

(defn cursor-word-end! [el]
  (when-let [pos (get-cursor-pos el)]
    (let [text (.-textContent el)
          len (count text)]
      (loop [i pos]
        (let [i (if (and (< i len) (word-delim? (str (aget text i))))
                  (loop [j i]
                    (if (and (< j len) (word-delim? (str (aget text j))))
                      (recur (inc j))
                      j))
                  i)]
          (if (>= i len)
            (set-cursor-pos el (max 0 (dec len)))
            (loop [j i]
              (if (and (< (inc j) len) (not (word-delim? (str (aget text (inc j))))))
                (recur (inc j))
                (set-cursor-pos el j)))))))))

(defn cursor-word-end-backward! [el]
  (when-let [pos (get-cursor-pos el)]
    (let [text (.-textContent el)
          len (count text)]
      (loop [i (dec pos)]
        (cond
          (< i 0) (set-cursor-pos el 0)
          (word-delim? (str (aget text i))) (recur (dec i))
          :else
          (let [word-end i
                start (loop [j word-end]
                        (if (and (> j 0) (not (word-delim? (str (aget text (dec j))))))
                          (recur (dec j))
                          j))]
            (loop [j start]
              (if (and (< (inc j) len) (not (word-delim? (str (aget text (inc j))))))
                (recur (inc j))
                (set-cursor-pos el j)))))))))

(defn cursor-find-char! [el ch]
  (when-let [pos (get-cursor-pos el)]
    (let [text (.-textContent el)
          next-idx (.indexOf text ch (inc pos))]
      (when (>= next-idx 0)
        (set-cursor-pos el next-idx)))))

(defn cursor-till-char! [el ch]
  (when-let [pos (get-cursor-pos el)]
    (let [text (.-textContent el)
          next-idx (.indexOf text ch (inc pos))]
      (when (>= next-idx 0)
        (set-cursor-pos el (dec next-idx))))))

Vimflowy app with full INSERT mode vim word/character motions:

**INSERT mode keybindings (contentEditable span focused):**
- `w` — move cursor to start of next word
- `b` — move cursor to start of previous word
- `e` — move cursor to end of current/next word
- `ge` — move cursor to end of previous word (two-key sequence via pending-motion atom)
- `f{char}` — find next occurrence of {char} and jump to it
- `t{char}` — till next occurrence of {char}, jumping just before it

**Implementation:**
- `get-text-el` — returns the focused contentEditable `.text-node` span
- `get-cursor-pos` — uses `window.getSelection().getRangeAt(0)` with a pre-range clone to compute character offset
- `set-cursor-pos` — sets selection on the text node at given offset
- `word-delim?` — recognizes space, tab, newline as word boundaries
- `cursor-word-forward!/backward!/end!/end-backward!` — parse text for word boundaries
- `cursor-find-char!/till-char!` — use `.indexOf` on text content
- `pending-motion` atom tracks f/t/g prefix keys waiting for a second key

Also updated help overlay to document the new INSERT mode motions. Saved to app.cljs and exported standalone index.html.
